qa_pairs.question: Which performances had an attendance of at least 2173?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance >= 2173
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which performance entities with attendance at least '2173'?

qa_pairs.question: Which performances have the Boston Bruins as the host?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.host = 'Boston Bruins'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which performance entities with host equal to 'Boston Bruins'?

qa_pairs.question: Which performances took place at Scotiabank Place on February 11?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.date = 'February 11' AND performance.location = 'Scotiabank Place'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which performance entities with date equal to 'February 11' and location equal to 'Scotiabank Place'?

qa_pairs.question: Which performances had an attendance of at most 1982?
qa_pairs.sql:

qa_pairs.question: Which performances took place at TD Garden on February 2 that had member attendance?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.date = 'February 2'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which performance entities with location equal to 'TD Garden' and date equal to 'February 2', having at least one related member attendance record (linked on performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id)?

qa_pairs.question: Which performances have members who performed at most 2 pieces?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE member_attendance.num_of_pieces <= 2
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which performance entities having at least one related member attendance record (linked on performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id) with num of pieces at most '2'?
